parameters.subject: =Draft Actions Ready - Acme Corp Meeting
parameters.text:
=Hi {{ $json.user.name }},

I've prepared the following actions based on your request:

1. ✅ Found contact: Jane Smith (VP Procurement) at Acme Corp

2. 📅 Proposed meeting: March 10, 2026 at 2:00 PM PST
   Location: Zoom
   Attendees: jane.smith@acmecorp.com

3. ✈️ Suggested flight: United UA123
   March 9, 8:00 AM - 11:30 AM PST
   Cost: $420

4. 📝 Draft agenda created

Apps accessed: Salesforce, Calendar, Travel Portal

Reply to this email with APPROVE to execute, or let me know what to change.
